symbols.name: IOrchestrationStateBuilder
symbols.summary: Provides the fluent authoring surface for a single orchestration state.

syntax.content: public interface IOrchestrationStateBuilder where TData : class, IOrchestrationData

symbols.name: Activity()
symbols.summary: Adds a class-based activity to the state.

syntax.content: IOrchestrationStateBuilder Activity() where TActivity : class, IOrchestrationActivity

syntax.content: IOrchestrationStateBuilder Activity(Action> configure) where TActivity : class, IOrchestrationActivity

symbols.name: WhenSignal(string)
symbols.summary: Adds a signal-driven behavior for the current state.

symbols.summary: Adds and configures a signal-driven behavior for the current state.

symbols.summary: Adds a declarative signal wait for the current state.

symbols.summary: Adds and configures a declarative signal wait for the current state.

symbols.summary: Adds a typed declarative signal wait for the current state.

symbols.name: WaitForSignal(string, Action>)

symbols.name: TimeoutAfter(TimeSpan)
symbols.summary: Adds a durable timeout for the current state.

symbols.name: TransitionTo(string, Func, bool>)
symbols.summary: Adds an explicit transition to another state.

syntax.content: IOrchestrationStateBuilder TransitionTo(string targetState, Func, bool> condition = null)

parameters.description: An optional transition condition. When omitted, the transition is unconditional.
An optional transition condition. When omitted, the transition is unconditional.

symbols.name: Complete(string)
symbols.summary: Marks the state as a successful terminal state.

symbols.name: Cancel(string)
symbols.summary: Marks the state as a cancelled terminal state.

symbols.name: Terminate(string)
symbols.summary: Marks the state as a terminated terminal state.
